sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105315" key="tritarthmo/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐταρτημόριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n105315.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">three quarters of an obol,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
